title: Opening for Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
